reviews.comment:
Se supone que es una estación de servicios, vos pagas por determinados servicios y recibir una normal atención .
Okey, está ypf es todo lo contrario, pésima atención poniéndote mala cara constante sobre todo en la sección de full, mala cara hasta para cambiar el canal de la televisión.
Tenía filtraciones de agua y los baños espantosamente horribles.

(Translated by Google)
It's supposed to be a gas station; you pay for certain services and expect decent customer service. Okay, this YPF is the complete opposite. The service is terrible, with constant rudeness, especially in the full-fuel section. They're even rude when you're changing the TV channel. It had water leaks, and the bathrooms were absolutely awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4UmRUZHRZbnBaWkZkdlgwd3hhemhrZW1adGJsRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The food was delicious. Our breakfast was a bit chaotic because there were few servers and little space for 49 people in our group, and then another group from the "Atacama Desert expedition" arrived. So the atmosphere became, let's say, "tense" for the servers. The environment is clean with excellent service from the staff.

(Original)
A comida estava gostosa. Nosso café  da manhã  foi um pouco tumultuado porque eram poucos atendentes  com espaço pequeno  para 49 pessoas do nosso grupo e chegou mais um grupo de "expedição deserto do Atacama". Então o ambiente ficou digamos que "tenso" para os atendentes. O ambiente é  limpo com ótimo  atendimento  dos funcionários.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210c1p6aHRVelJCVDFCa1MwMU5jVWt6VWxWRk9VRRAB
